title: dacryodes cupularis
intro: Dacryodes cupularis, also known as the Bitter Mango or Bush Mango, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dacryodes cupularis include treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Dacryodes cupularis can be prepared into herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are traditionally used in African medicine to promote healing and well-being.
